# Tasks: Register a User

**Use case:** `domain/usecases/register-user.md`
**Flow:** `domain/flows/user-registration.md`
**Domain:** user
**Generated by:** decomposer-agent

---

## Summary

A guest fills in `firstName`, `lastName`, `address`, and `email` on the `/register` screen and submits. The backend validates all fields, checks email uniqueness, persists a `User` with `status: active`, emits `UserRegistered`, and returns HTTP 201 with `userId`. The frontend redirects to `/login` with a success banner. Three server-side error cases: missing field (400), invalid email format (400), duplicate email (409).

---

## ⚠️ Flags

- `UserRegisteredEvent` payload (`userId`, `email`, `timestamp`) is inferred from the `UserLoggedIn` pattern in `domain/flows/user-login.md`. The flow doc states "Emits `UserRegistered`" but does not list payload fields. Confirm before implementing EVT-1 if a different payload is required.

---

### DB-1 — Create `UserStatus` enum

**Layer:** Database
**Domain:** user
**Use case:** register-user
**Implements:** user-registration — step 8 (status set to `active`)
**Inputs:** `domain/model/user.md` — `status` field: `active | suspended | closed`
**Outputs:** `UserStatus.kt` enum at `org.dpp.tradelab.user.model`
**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] Enum has exactly three values: `ACTIVE`, `SUSPENDED`, `CLOSED`
- [ ] File lives at `org/dpp/tradelab/user/model/UserStatus.kt`
- [ ] `@DataJpaTest` verifies the enum persists and reads back as `STRING` (not ordinal)
**Depends on:** none

---

### DB-2 — Create `User` JPA entity

**Layer:** Database
**Domain:** user
**Use case:** register-user
**Implements:** user-registration — step 8 (create user record)
**Inputs:** `domain/model/user.md` — all 8 fields; `UserStatus` enum (DB-1)
**Outputs:** `User.kt` entity at `org.dpp.tradelab.user.model`
**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] Class is annotated `@Entity`
- [ ] `id` is `UUID`, annotated `@GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.UUID)`
- [ ] `firstName`, `lastName`, `address`, `email` are `String`, each mapped with `@Column(nullable = false)`
- [ ] `email` has `@Column(nullable = false, unique = true)`
- [ ] `status` is `UserStatus`, annotated `@Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)`, `@Column(nullable = false)`
- [ ] `createdAt` is `Instant`, annotated `@CreationTimestamp`
- [ ] `updatedAt` is `Instant`, annotated `@UpdateTimestamp`
- [ ] `@DataJpaTest` verifies: entity persists with all fields; `id` is auto-generated; `createdAt`/`updatedAt` are set; saving two users with the same email throws a constraint violation
**Depends on:** DB-1

### SVC-1 — Implement `UserService.registerUser`

**Layer:** Service
**Domain:** user
**Use case:** register-user
**Implements:** user-registration — steps 5, 6, 7, 8, 9
**Inputs:**
- `firstName: String`
- `lastName: String`
- `address: String`
- `email: String`
**Outputs:**
- Returns `UUID` (the newly created user's `id`)
- Publishes `UserRegisteredEvent` via `ApplicationEventPublisher`
- Throws `DuplicateEmailException` if email already exists
**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] Method is annotated `@Transactional`
- [ ] Throws `DuplicateEmailException` when `existsByEmail` returns `true` — no user is persisted
- [ ] Persists a new `User` with all provided fields and `status = ACTIVE`
- [ ] Returns the persisted user's `id` as `UUID`
- [ ] Publishes `UserRegisteredEvent` with `userId`, `email`, `timestamp` after successful save
- [ ] KoTest: `registerUser_duplicateEmail_throwsDuplicateEmailException`
- [ ] KoTest: `registerUser_validInput_persistsUserWithActiveStatus`
- [ ] KoTest: `registerUser_validInput_returnsNewUserId`
- [ ] KoTest: `registerUser_validInput_publishesUserRegisteredEvent`
- [ ] Repository is mocked; domain logic is not
**Depends on:** REPO-1, API-1, EVT-1

### API-4 — Implement `UserController.registerUser`

**Layer:** API
**Domain:** user
**Use case:** register-user
**Implements:** user-registration — steps 5, 6, 10 and all three error cases
**Inputs:**
- `RegisterUserRequest` (API-3)
- `RegisterUserResponse` (API-3)
- `UserService.registerUser` (SVC-1)
- `DuplicateEmailException` handler in `GlobalExceptionHandler` (API-2)
**Outputs:** `UserController.kt` at `org.dpp.tradelab.user.api` with `POST /api/v1/users` endpoint
**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] Controller class is `@RestController`, `@RequestMapping("/api/v1/users")`
- [ ] `registerUser` method handles `POST /`, accepts `@Valid @RequestBody RegisterUserRequest`
- [ ] Returns HTTP 201 with `RegisterUserResponse(userId)` on success
- [ ] `@Valid` triggers Bean Validation — missing/blank fields return HTTP 400 via `GlobalExceptionHandler`
- [ ] `DuplicateEmailException` from the service propagates to `GlobalExceptionHandler` → HTTP 409
- [ ] No repository or persistence calls in the controller — delegates entirely to `UserService`
- [ ] `@WebMvcTest` + MockMvc:
  - [ ] `registerUser_validRequest_returns201WithUserId`
  - [ ] `registerUser_missingFirstName_returns400`
  - [ ] `registerUser_invalidEmailFormat_returns400`
  - [ ] `registerUser_duplicateEmail_returns409`
**Depends on:** API-2, API-3, SVC-1

- [ ] Surfaces Axios errors (400, 409) to the caller — does not swallow errors

### STATE-1 — Implement `useRegisterUser` mutation hook

**Layer:** State
**Domain:** user
**Use case:** register-user
**Implements:** user-registration — steps 3, 4 (submit + loading state), step 7 (redirect on success), all failure scenarios
**Inputs:** `createUser` API function (CLI-1)
**Outputs:** `useRegisterUser` hook in `services/front-end/src/domains/user/hooks/useRegisterUser.ts`
**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] Built with TanStack Query `useMutation`
- [ ] Exposes: `mutate`, `isPending` (for disabling submit button), `isSuccess`, `error`
- [ ] On success: calls the provided `onSuccess` callback (caller uses it to redirect to `/login`)
- [ ] On 409 error: surfaces the conflict so the component can display the form-level error
- [ ] On 400 error: surfaces the validation error so the component can display inline errors
- [ ] Vitest (`renderHook`): `useRegisterUser - success - callsOnSuccessCallback`
- [ ] Vitest (`renderHook`): `useRegisterUser - 409 response - exposesConflictError`
- [ ] Vitest (`renderHook`): `useRegisterUser - 400 response - exposesValidationError`
**Depends on:** CLI-1

### COMP-1 — Implement `RegistrationForm` component

**Layer:** Component
**Domain:** user
**Use case:** register-user
**Implements:** user-registration — steps 1, 2, 3, 4 (form render, fill, submit, loading); all three error cases
**Inputs:** `useRegisterUser` hook (STATE-1)
**Outputs:** `RegistrationForm` component in `services/front-end/src/domains/user/components/RegistrationForm.tsx`
**Acceptance criteria:**
- [ ] Renders input fields for `firstName`, `lastName`, `address`, `email`
- [ ] Renders a Submit button
- [ ] Submit button is disabled and a loading indicator is shown while `isPending` is `true`
- [ ] Inline validation error displayed below each field when that field is missing or blank (client-side)
- [ ] Inline validation error displayed below `email` field when format is invalid (client-side)
- [ ] Form-level error displayed at the top when the server returns 409: "An account with this email already exists."
- [ ] Submit button re-enabled after any error
- [ ] RTL tests:
  - [ ] `RegistrationForm - renders all fields and submit button`
  - [ ] `RegistrationForm - submit with empty fields - shows inline errors`
  - [ ] `RegistrationForm - submit with invalid email - shows email error`
  - [ ] `RegistrationForm - loading state - disables submit button`
  - [ ] `RegistrationForm - 409 error - shows form-level duplicate email error`
**Depends on:** STATE-1
